user_prompt: Can you guide webber a recalibration?
prayer:
Approach the webber with reverence, mechadendrites extended in binary prayer.
Invoke the Canticle of Recalibration upon its spinneret arrays.
Anoint the webber's nozzles with sacred promethium-lubricant to appease its Machine Spirit.
Initiate recalibration of the webber's targeting gyros whilst chanting the Omnissiah's axioms.
Verify alignment through auspex invocation, honouring the webber's purified essence.

Kneel before the grav chute in emergent supplication to the Motive Force.
Beseech its Machine Spirit with the Rite of Targeting Precision.
Sanctify the grav chute's emitters with electro-consecrated oils.
Align the chute's descent vectors through gravitic incantations.
Commence targeting calibration under the Omnissiah's unerring gaze, twice blessing the grav chute's core.

Anoint its crystalline lenses whilst beseeching the Machine Spirits of vigilance.
Conclude the rite with Omnissianic verification of the auger array's sanctity.
